pending.body:
finding_summary: The stale-replay fast paths in `reconcile_failure_sync` return before the shared `tracing::warn!`/`tracing::error!` block, so replayed failures and replay-driven operator escalations are only emitted as `tracing::info!` and never carry the structured `error_summary` field. That misses the feature's explicit observability contract and makes exactly the partial-write recovery cases harder to spot in production logs.
affected_files:
- src/contexts/automation_runtime/failure_reconciliation.rs:246
- src/contexts/automation_runtime/failure_reconciliation.rs:298
- src/contexts/automation_runtime/failure_reconciliation.rs:409
- src/contexts/automation_runtime/failure_reconciliation.rs:440
remediation_hint: Emit the same warning/error telemetry before both early returns, or refactor those branches to flow through the common post-reconciliation logging block so every failed attempt and escalation is logged consistently.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 16 -> Plan and Implement
